actionCalls.description: Gets the job offers ready for creation update, or other existing job offers not flagged for DML
actionCalls.name: getJobOffersForUpsert
actionCalls.label: getJobOffersForUpsert

actionCalls.description: Sends invitation reminder emails to the contact email addresses in the Email Address Collection
actionCalls.name: sendInvitationReminderEmail
actionCalls.label: Send Invitation Reminder Email

actionCalls.description: Need a new transaction set as the job offer is updated individually in a loop since WFM does not support bulkification when approving Job Offers requiring the updates to be performed in single DMLs
actionCalls.name: Set_New_Transaction
actionCalls.label: Set New Transaction

assignments.description: Adds the current contact Id to the activeJobOfferContactIds collection variable.
assignments.name: addContactId
assignments.label: Add Contact Id

assignments.description: Adds the current Contact name to the errorRecipientsList collection.
assignments.name: addContactNameToRecipients
assignments.label: Add Contact Name To Recipients

assignments.description: Adds the current Email address to the errorRecipientsList collection.
assignments.name: addEmailToRecipient
assignments.label: Add Email To Recipient

assignments.description: Adds the current User's name to the errorRecipientsList collection.
assignments.name: addUserNameToRecipients
assignments.label: Add User Name To Recipients

assignments.name: Assign_Job_offers_to_approve_count
assignments.label: Assign Job offers to approve count

assignments.description: Assign the current push notification and add to the collection
assignments.name: assignCurrentPushNotification
assignments.label: Assign Current Push Notification

assignments.description: Assign the job offer to the current job offer
assignments.name: assignJobOffer
assignments.label: Assign Job Offer

assignments.name: AssignJobOfferErrorToGeneralError
assignments.label: Assign Job Offer Error To General Error

assignments.description: Captures the fault message to present to the user.
assignments.name: captureFaultMessage
assignments.label: Capture Fault Message

assignments.description: Clears a list of variables and collections so that the existing values are not retained if a user performs another action.
assignments.name: clearVariablesAndCollections
assignments.label: Clear Variables And Collections

assignments.description: Show a general error but allow continue to Existing Worker invitations screen
assignments.name: generalErrorwithContinue
assignments.label: General Error with Continue

assignments.description: Add the recordId to the demandIds collection.
assignments.name: populateDemandList
assignments.label: Populate Demand List

assignments.name: Set_Accepted_Job_Offers_to_Complete
assignments.label: Set Accepted Job Offers to Complete

assignments.description: Counts the amount of workers selected by the user.
assignments.name: Set_Selected_Workers_Count
assignments.label: Set Count Selected Workers

assignments.name: setApprovedJobOfferstoStale
assignments.label: Set Approved Job Offers to Stale

assignments.description: Counts the amount of workers selected by the user.
assignments.name: SetCountSelectedAvailableWorkers
assignments.label: Set Count Selected Workers

assignments.description: Counts the amount of workers selected by the user.
assignments.name: setCountSelectedWorkersToReject
assignments.label: Set Count Selected Workers

assignments.description: Counts the amount of workers selected by the user.
assignments.name: SetCountSelectedWorkersToRemind
assignments.label: Set Count Selected Workers

assignments.description: Counts the amount of workers selected by the user.
assignments.name: SetCountSelectedWorkersToUninvite
assignments.label: Set Count Selected Workers

assignments.description: Sets the IsManagerApproval variable to False.
assignments.name: setIsManagerApprovalFalse
assignments.label: Set Is Manager Approval False

assignments.description: Set the IsManagerApproval variable to True.
assignments.name: setIsManagerApprovalTrue
assignments.label: Set Is Manager Approval True

assignments.description: Sets the paramsAlreadyEntered variable as true
assignments.name: setParamsEntered
assignments.label: Set Params Entered

assignments.description: Set the ScreenToDisplay variable to AvailableWorkersChoice.
assignments.name: setScreenToAvailableWorkers
assignments.label: Set Screen To Available Workers

assignments.description: Set the ScreenToDisplay variable to ExistingInvitationsChoice.
assignments.name: setScreenToExistingInvitations
assignments.label: Set Screen To Existing Invitations

assignments.description: Having been through the process of showing existing Job Offers we now need to make sure we show the warning if necessary.
assignments.name: SetShowNoJobOffersWarning
assignments.label: Set Show No Job Offers Warning

choices.name: inviteFastestFingerFirstChoice
choices.choiceText: Invite the selected worker(s) with Fastest Finger First

value.stringValue: Invite the selected worker(s) with Fastest Finger First

choices.name: inviteManagerApprovalChoice
choices.choiceText: Invite the selected worker(s) with Manager Approval

value.stringValue: Invite the selected worker(s) with Manager Approval

choices.name: reminderChoice
choices.choiceText: Send a reminder to the selected worker(s)

value.stringValue: Send a reminder to the selected worker(s)

constants.description: Error to present to the user when the Site, Location, Job Role, Job Type and Rota are not the same across all shifts.
constants.name: fieldsAreNotTheSameError

value.stringValue: Ensure that the Site, Location, Job Role, Job Type and Rota are the same for all shifts.
There are no existing job offers.

decisions.name: Are_there_existing_accepted_job_offers
decisions.label: Are there existing accepted job offers

decisions.description: The decision to perform from the chosen action.
decisions.name: availableWorkersAction
decisions.label: Available Workers Action

decisions.name: CheckGetJobOffersError
decisions.label: Check Get Job Offers Error
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Does Not Job Offer Get Error

decisions.description: Check if there are any non-complete job offers that should be deleted.
decisions.name: checkIfAnyJobOffersToDelete
decisions.label: Check If Any Job Offers To Delete

decisions.description: Checks if any records were found, to ensure that reminders are only sent when there are some non-complete job offers.
decisions.name: checkIfAnySelectedActiveJobOffers
decisions.label: Check If Any Selected Active Job Offers

decisions.description: Checks if the current recipient contains the @ symbol to see if the recipient is an email address.
decisions.name: checkIfRecipientContainsAtSymbol
decisions.label: Check If Recipient Contains @ Symbol

decisions.description: Checks what screen to display based on the ScreenToDisplay value.
decisions.name: displayCorrectScreen
decisions.label: Display Correct Screen

decisions.description: Checks if the activeJobOfferContactIds collection variable contains the current contact.
decisions.name: doesTheContactExist
decisions.label: Does The Contact Exist

decisions.description: The decision to perform from the chosen action.
decisions.name: existingInvitationsAction
decisions.label: Existing Invitations Action

decisions.description: Did the user request FFF or Manager Approval.
decisions.name: fffOrManagerApproval
decisions.label: FFF OR Manager Approval

decisions.description: Checks if the user has already entered the params screen.
decisions.name: haveParamsAlreadyBeenEntered
decisions.label: Have Params Already Been Entered

decisions.description: The decision to perform based on if the recordId is set.
decisions.name: isRecordIdNull
decisions.label: Is Record Id Null

decisions.description: Determines whether to use the medium or large variant for the screen.
decisions.name: screenWidthAvailableWorkers
decisions.label: Screen Width

decisions.description: Determines whether to use the medium or large variant for the screen.
decisions.name: screenWidthExistingInvitations
decisions.label: Screen Width

decisions.description: The decision to determine if the user has selected at least one worker to invite.
decisions.name: SelectedAvailableWorkers
decisions.label: Selected Workers

decisions.description: The decision to determine if the user has selected at least one worker to remind.
decisions.name: selectedWorkersForApprove
decisions.label: Selected Workers for approve

decisions.description: The decision to determine if the user has selected at least one worker to remind.
decisions.name: selectedWorkersToReject
decisions.label: Selected Workers

decisions.description: The decision to determine if the user has selected at least one worker to remind.
decisions.name: SelectedWorkersToRemind
decisions.label: Selected Workers

decisions.description: The decision to determine if the user has selected at least one worker to invite.
decisions.name: SelectedWorkersToUninvite
decisions.label: Selected Workers

decisions.description: When there are no existing Job Offers we should only warn the user if they tried to access them manually.
decisions.name: ShouldShowNoExistingJobOffersScreen
decisions.label: Should Show No Existing Job Offers Screen

rules.name: DisplayNoExistingJobOffersScreen
rules.label: Display No Existing Job Offers Screen

formulas.description: The formatted text of the selected value of the Highest Severity Broken picklist, provided to the Invite Workers Search component.
formulas.name: maxSeverity

loops.description: Iterate the invitations to update, creating records with only the fields that need updating, avoiding the risk of overwriting fields that have been changed outside of the flow
loops.name: buildJobOffersForUpdate
loops.label: Build Job Offers For Update

loops.description: Loop through the contact records where the Id is in emailRecipientsError.
loops.name: iterateErrorContacts
loops.label: Iterate Contacts With Failed Email

loops.description: Loop through the contact records where the Id or email is in emailRecipientsError.
loops.name: iterateErrorUsers
loops.label: Iterate Users With Failed Email

recordDeletes.description: Delete any job offers that were retrieved.
recordDeletes.name: deleteJobOffers
recordDeletes.label: Delete Job Offers

recordLookups.description: Get all the active job offers.
recordLookups.name: Get_Accepted_Job_Offers
recordLookups.label: Get Accepted Job Offers

recordLookups.description: See if there is an active job offer from any of the input jobs.
recordLookups.name: getActiveJobOffer
recordLookups.label: Get Active Job Offer

recordLookups.description: Get all the active job offers.
recordLookups.name: getActiveJobOffers
recordLookups.label: Get Active Job Offers

recordLookups.description: Get all the active job offers.
recordLookups.name: getActiveJobOffersToReject
recordLookups.label: Get Active Job Offers

recordLookups.description: Gets all the contacts where the id is in the emailRecipientsError collection.
recordLookups.name: getContactsWithFailedEmails
recordLookups.label: Get Contacts With Failed Emails

recordLookups.description: Get the Job Offers to be deleted when the uninvite option is selected.
recordLookups.name: getJobOffersToDelete
recordLookups.label: Get Job Offers To Delete

recordLookups.description: Gets all the users where the id is in the emailRecipientsError collection.
recordLookups.name: getUsersWithFailedEmails
recordLookups.label: Get Users With Failed Emails

recordUpdates.description: WFM does not support bulkification when approving Job Offers requiring the updates to be performed in single DMLs
recordUpdates.name: Update_job_offer_to_complete
recordUpdates.label: Update job offer to complete

recordUpdates.description: Updates the job offers returned from the apex call
recordUpdates.name: updateJobOffers
recordUpdates.label: Update Job Offers

fields.name: Copy_1_of_PleaseSelectAWorkerToReject
fields.fieldText: Please select at least one worker to approve, with the offer in Accepted status.

screens.description: The Available Workers Screen using a single column.
screens.name: availableWorkersScreenMedium
screens.label: Available Workers Screen

fields.name: Approve_Workers_Message_Large
fields.fieldText: This action may take a little time. Please wait until the results are shown as closing the dialog early may prevent the approvals from being done.

screens.description: The Existing Invitations Screen using a single column.
screens.name: existingInvitationsScreenMedium
screens.label: Existing Invitations Screen

fields.name: Approve_Message_Medium
fields.fieldText: This action may take a little time. Please wait until the results are shown as closing the dialog early may prevent the approvals from being done.

fields.name: errorMessageWithContinue
fields.fieldText: An error occurred. {!generalError}

fields.name: generalErrorMessage
fields.fieldText: An error occurred. {!generalError}

fields.name: Invalid_Job_Message
fields.fieldText: Sorry, this Job is no longer valid. It may be filled, closed, cancelled, or already finished.

screens.name: More_Job_Offers_Than_Openings_Screen
screens.label: More Job Offers Than Openings Screen

fields.name: Job_Offers_Exceed_Openings_Message
fields.fieldText: Sorry, you have selected more workers than the number of openings for the Job.

screens.description: Display a message when the user did not select at least one worker.
screens.name: NoAvailableWorkersSelectedScreen
screens.label: No Workers Selected

fields.name: PleaseSelectAvailableWorkerText
fields.fieldText: Please select at least one worker to invite.

screens.description: Displayed when there are no existing Job Offers.
screens.name: NoExistingJobOffers
screens.label: No Existing Job Offers

fields.name: PleaseSelectAWorkerForReminder
fields.fieldText: Please select at least one worker to send a reminder.

fields.name: PleaseSelectAWorker
fields.fieldText: Please select at least one worker to uninvite.

fields.name: PleaseSelectAWorkerToReject
fields.fieldText: Please select at least one worker to reject.

fields.name: Explanation
fields.fieldText: Before you continue finding more workers please review these parameters.

fields.name: minimumPercentage
fields.helpText: Choose how good a match the worker must be for the job. Workers with a match percentage less than this are not considered. A 100% match means the Worker is a perfect match for the job.

fields.name: highestSeverityBroken
fields.helpText: The worker's match percentage is reduced when certain rules are broken. However, rules have a severity and this is used to make sure that workers with broken rules with severities higher than this selection are not considered. If any broken rule should exclude the worker choose “None”. If no broken rule should exclude the worker choose “Fatal”.

fields.name: maximumDistance
fields.helpText: Workers are only considered if they live within a default as-the-crow-flies distance of the job's site. This allows that default distance to be overridden.

screens.description: The screen to display the error message and list of error recipients if there are any.
screens.name: sendEmailErrorScreen
screens.label: Send Email Error Screen

screens.description: The screen displayed once reminders have been sent to the selected workers.
screens.name: sentRemindersScreen
screens.label: Sent Reminders Screen

fields.name: sentRemindersText
fields.fieldText: Reminders have been sent to the selected workers.

variables.description: The contact ids of those with active job offers.
variables.name: activeJobOfferContactIds

variables.description: Has the flow already captured the values of the fields (site, rota, location, job type, job role) that need to be the same across all shifts.
variables.name: areShiftFieldsSet

variables.description: It is not possible to check the size of a collection in a flow. Instead, the amount of selected workers is counted after the action is performed.
variables.name: countSelectedWorkers

variables.description: The error message sent back in the results of the email invocable method
variables.name: emailSendError

variables.description: The email template for the invitation reminder
variables.name: emailTemplateInvitationReminder

variables.description: The final job offers for update, with only the fields for update in them
variables.name: finalJobffersForUpdate

variables.description: A variable used to set errors against to be used in the General Error screen
variables.name: generalError

variables.description: The error returned from the GetJobOffersForUpsert apex call
variables.name: GetJobOffersForUpsertError

variables.description: A list of invitations to be created
variables.name: invitationsToCreate

variables.description: A list of invitations to update
variables.name: invitationsToUpdate

variables.description: Whether the Job Offers should be flagged for manager approval or not
variables.name: isManagerApproval

variables.description: A concat of errors when saving updates when completing job offers
variables.name: jobOfferCompleteErrors

variables.description: The current push notification in an iteration
variables.name: pushNotificationCurrent

variables.description: A collection to hold push notification events ready for creation. This allows adding What and Who IDs whilst iterating the active Job Offers
variables.name: pushNotificationEventCollection

variables.description: Stores the number of remaining openings for the current Job.
variables.name: remainingOpeningsCount

variables.description: Input property allowing the width of certain screens to be changed. Must be one of "Medium" or "Large".
variables.name: screenWidth

variables.description: A list of the Ids of the workers that have been selected by the user on which to perform the selected action.
variables.name: selectedWorkerIds

variables.description: Controls display of a screen warning the user that there are no existing Job Offers.
variables.name: showNoJobOffersWarning
